message:
native: NAPI bindings for persistent buffers + readBuffer

Adds:
  createBuffer(backend, bytes) → BigInt buffer pointer
  releaseBuffer(bufPtr)
  writeBuffer(backend, bufPtr, offset, bytes)  — for tokenIds upload per forward
  readBuffer(backend, bufPtr, offset, byteLen) → Uint8Array  — final readback
  dispatchByBuffers(backend, name, ..., inputs, ...) — inputs may be
    {binding, bytes} (transient) OR {binding, bufPtr, byteLen} (persistent)

Verified: rms_norm via persistent buffers produces byte-equal output
to the dispatchByName path. Foundation for e2e forward orchestration.
